title: Shop the Brave and Bold Collection Online!
excerpt: Exciting news, friends! Brave + Bold , my newest collection with American Crafts, is now available to purchase ONLINE! Click the button to shop the Brave + Bold collection and have a look at some of the fun new scrapbooking…
body:
Exciting news, friends! Brave + Bold, my newest collection with American Crafts, is now available to purchase ONLINE! Click the button to shop the Brave + Bold collection and have a look at some of the fun new scrapbooking supplies and some layouts with the new products below!

SHOP NOW  

Vinyl Stickers and Washi Tape from the Brave and Bold collection by Amy Tangerine

Clear Acrylic Stamp Set and Sticker Book

12x12 Patterned Paper and Die Cuts

Sticker Roll and Travel Watercolor Set

12x12 Scrapbook Layout and Traveler’s Notebook Spread

Want to see some of the products up close? Watch my YouTube video and see me swatch the new colors in the Travel Watercolor Set!

I hope you love this new collection as much as I do! I’d love to see what you create with these new goodies from Brave + Bold. Tag me Instagram @amytangerine and use #amytangerine and #atbraveandbold!
